Exported

ansi/style

src/ansi/style.tur

SGR text-attribute toggles (bold, italic, underline, ...).

defn

style-bold

(style-bold)

enable bold (SGR 1).

Since: tur-ansi AN1

defn

style-dim

(style-dim)

enable dim / faint (SGR 2).

defn

style-italic

(style-italic)

enable italic (SGR 3).

defn

style-underline

(style-underline)

enable underline (SGR 4).

defn

style-blink

(style-blink)

enable slow blink (SGR 5).

defn

style-blink-fast

(style-blink-fast)

enable rapid blink (SGR 6); rarely supported.

defn

style-reverse

(style-reverse)

enable reverse video / inverse (SGR 7).

defn

style-strikethrough

(style-strikethrough)

enable strikethrough (SGR 9).

defn

style-reset

(style-reset)

clear all SGR attributes including foreground/background.
